mapper.sql: ModelNo, MinQuantity, FobPrice, EPrice, EPriceJp, EpricePra, LowestPrice, ImportFobPrice, ExportFobPrice, is_deleted, UpdateTime, ImportFobPriceOriginal, ImportCurrencyId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_ptest
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_ptest (ModelNo, MinQuantity, FobPrice, EPrice, EPriceJp, EpricePra, LowestPrice, ImportFobPrice, ExportFobPrice, is_deleted, UpdateTime, ImportFobPriceOriginal, ImportCurrencyId ) values (#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.product_ptest
ModelNo,
MinQuantity,
FobPrice,
EPrice,
EPriceJp,
EpricePra,
LowestPrice,
ImportFobPrice,
ExportFobPrice,
is_deleted,
UpdateTime,
ImportFobPriceOriginal,
ImportCurrencyId,
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.product_ptest
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MinQuantity = #{record.minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
FobPrice = #{record.fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EPriceJp = #{record.epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EpricePra = #{record.epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
LowestPrice = #{record.lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ImportFobPrice = #{record.importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ExportFobPrice = #{record.exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ImportFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ImportCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.product_ptest set ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MinQuantity = #{record.minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FobPrice = #{record.fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EPrice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EPriceJp = #{record.epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EpricePra = #{record.epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, LowestPrice = #{record.lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ImportFobPrice = #{record.importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ExportFobPrice = #{record.exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, is_deleted = #{record.isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, UpdateTime = #{record.updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ImportFobPriceOriginal = #{record.importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ImportCurrencyId = #{record.importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.product_ptest
FobPrice = #{fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EPrice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EPriceJp = #{epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EpricePra = #{epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
LowestPrice = #{lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ImportFobPrice = #{importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ExportFobPrice = #{exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT},
UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ImportFobPriceOriginal = #{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ImportCurrencyId = #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and MinQuantity = #{minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.product_ptest set FobPrice = #{fobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EPrice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EPriceJp = #{epricejp,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EpricePra = #{epricepra,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, LowestPrice = #{lowestprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ImportFobPrice = #{importfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ExportFobPrice = #{exportfobprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, UpdateTime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, ImportFobPriceOriginal = #{importfobpriceoriginal,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, ImportCurrencyId = #{importcurrencyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where ModelNo = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and MinQuantity = #{minquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}
